user.title: Connect to Asmoke Cloud
user.description: Enter the Asmoke MQTT broker settings first. Home Assistant validates these credentials before asking for the device ID from your smoker. The MQTT username and password are intentionally not stored in the public repository; contact the maintainer directly for setup help if you do not already have them.

manual.title: Enter Asmoke device ID
manual.description: Enter the device ID for your own smoker. In the Asmoke app, open Me -> Device and copy the value shown next to Device ID.

reauth_confirm.title: Update broker credentials
reauth_confirm.description: Broker authentication failed. Update the broker settings to continue.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Asmoke MQTT broker
error.invalid_auth: Broker authentication failed. Check the MQTT username and password.

abort.already_configured: This Asmoke device is already configured

error.already_configured: This Asmoke device is already configured
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Asmoke MQTT broker
error.invalid_auth: Broker authentication failed. Check the MQTT username and password.

publish_raw_action.name: Publish raw action
publish_raw_action.description: Publish a raw Asmoke action payload.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID if multiple Asmoke integrations are loaded.

device_id.name: Asmoke device ID
device_id.description: Optional Asmoke device ID if multiple entries are loaded.

command.name: Command
command.description: Asmoke command name, for example Smoke.

payload.name: Payload
payload.description: Optional JSON object or JSON string to use as the data field.

set_smoke_target_temp.name: Set smoke target temperature
set_smoke_target_temp.description: Publish the confirmed Smoke target temperature command.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID if multiple Asmoke integrations are loaded.

device_id.name: Asmoke device ID
device_id.description: Optional Asmoke device ID if multiple entries are loaded.

target_temp.name: Target temperature
target_temp.description: Target grill temperature to publish with the Smoke command.

start_cook.name: Start cook
start_cook.description: Start a confirmed Asmoke cook mode.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID if multiple Asmoke integrations are loaded.

device_id.name: Asmoke device ID
device_id.description: Optional Asmoke device ID if multiple entries are loaded.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Confirmed mode to start, for example smoke, quick, or roast.

target_temp.name: Target temperature
target_temp.description: Target grill temperature to publish with the selected cook command.

target_time.name: Target time
target_time.description: Target cook time in minutes for confirmed modes that require a duration.

probe_temp.name: Probe temperature
probe_temp.description: Target probe temperature for the confirmed Roast command.

ingredient_category.name: Ingredient category
ingredient_category.description: Confirmed ingredient category value for the Roast command, for example Beef.

k_value.name: K value
k_value.description: Confirmed kValue string for the Roast command.

stop_cook.name: Stop cook
stop_cook.description: Publish the confirmed Asmoke stop command.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID if multiple Asmoke integrations are loaded.

device_id.name: Asmoke device ID
device_id.description: Optional Asmoke device ID if multiple entries are loaded.
